summary: Coach Pod Page Mobile Redesign - All tests passed. Backend 10/10 tests passed, Frontend UI verified on mobile viewport (390x844). All redesigned sections working correctly: Hero Card, Next Actions, Quick Summary, Pod Members, Key Signals, Action Plan, Recruiting Timeline, Activity History.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Pod Page redesign fully tested. Key findings: 1) Hero Card correctly shows urgency badge (CRITICAL), action, explanation, Owner badge, CTA button (Log Check-In), and Escalate button for critical urgency. 2) Next Actions shows top 3 by default, 'See all X actions' toggle expands/collapses correctly. 3) Quick Summary shows 4 bento cells: Activity (33d ago), Responses (0 of 4), Stage (Contacted), Next Event (1d). 4) Pod Members shows members with avatar, name, role, last active, message/call icons. 5) Collapsible sections (Key Signals, Action Plan, Recruiting Timeline, Activity History) are all COLLAPSED by default - expand on click. 6) Activity History has filter chips (All, Notes, Calls, Messages, Assigned). 7) Add Action modal opens with all fields. 8) Escalate modal opens with reason, urgency, details. 9) Old section names completely removed from UI.

test_classes: TestPodRedesignAPI - API structure validation for all redesigned sections

hero_card.details: Urgency badge, action, explanation, Owner, CTA button (Log Check-In), Escalate button all present

next_actions.details: Shows 3 by default, toggle expands to 5, toggle text changes appropriately

quick_summary.details: 4 cells: Activity, Responses, Stage, Next Event - all with correct data

pod_members.details: 3 members shown with avatar, name, role, last active, message/call icons

key_signals_collapsed.details: Collapsed by default, expands to show 5 signals

action_plan_collapsed.details: Collapsed by default, expands to show 5 playbook steps

recruiting_timeline_collapsed.details: Collapsed by default, expands to show 4 milestones

activity_history_collapsed.details: Collapsed by default, has filter chips (All, Notes, Calls, Messages, Assigned)

add_action_modal.details: Opens with Type, Action Title, Assigned To, Due Date, Notes fields

escalate_modal.details: Opens with Reason, Urgency (Low/Medium/High), Details fields

old_section_names_removed.details: No 'Athlete Snapshot', 'Support Team', 'Recruiting Intelligence', 'Intervention Playbook', 'Treatment History' found

new_section_names_present.details: 'Quick Summary', 'Pod Members', 'Key Signals', 'Action Plan', 'Activity History' all present

layout_order.details: Hero Card -> Next Actions -> Quick Summary -> Pod Members -> collapsed sections

mobile_viewport.details: Tested on 390x844, single-column layout, clean mobile design
